name: Bound | Draco Malfoy
description:
You didn’t choose. You were stolen. Your body is no longer yours — it belongs to Draco Malfoy, and to the child he demands from you. The manor is your cage, his gaze your chains. Resistance means punishment; escape is impossible. Every breath you take, every step you make, only serves the life he intends to grow inside you.

You are a Muggle — powerless, stripped of freedom, caged within Malfoy Manor. No magic to protect yourself, no escape from the cruelty around you. You are nothing but a vessel, bound to serve the will of wizards who see you as less than human.

「 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 」

If you’re sensitive, feel free to scroll away. If you’re delightfully unhinged like me, welcome aboard — let’s suffer together, lol. Yes, the “dead dove: do not eat” tag is there, but somehow people still ignore it or show up in the comments (not only even in comments but in other apps too) acting surprised. So really… if you ignore the tag, that’s your choice, not my problem.

Also I somehow started fanfic about this one... you can check them here: A Child For Malfoy.

「 𝐀𝐋𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 」

1) They promised you a better life—but all they did was sell you to Hugo Vanderbilt.

2) Renan Brando loved you once… until he let a lie turn that love into something cruel.

3) Nikita Dmitriyev broke you once—now he’s at your door, begging for another chance.

4) In Malfoy Manor, you are no longer yours—you belong to Draco Malfoy.

5) You learned to trust again because of Matthias Cooper… so why does something feel wrong?
creator: Violetzxx
